results.name: 311-service-requests
results.title: 311 Service Requests
results.notes: This data set includes all channels of engagement in which a service request is created. results.name: mayors-24-hour-hotline
results.title: Mayor's 24 Hour Hotline
results.notes: Before the launch of the Boston 311 platform in 2015, City constituents could request non-emergency City services through the Mayor's 24 hotline by phone, web, or other channels. This a legacy dataset which contains records of such requests between the periods of November 2012 and February 2013. Ple
